message: 🌱 Add kubeflow: Dashboard's contributors section doesn't show all the mission (#636)

@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubeflow-4569-dashboard-s-contributors-section-doesn-t-show-all-the-namespaces-i",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubeflow: Dashboard's contributors section doesn't show all the namespaces I own",
+    "description": "Dashboard's contributors section doesn't show all the namespaces I own. This issue affects 8+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify kubeflow troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kubeflow deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow -n kubeflow --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubeflow configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubeflow configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow\nkubectl get configmap -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubeflow\n```\n**What steps did you take and what happened:**\n1. I set up a Kubeflow 0.7 cluster and get a `gongyuan` namespace.\n2. I created a profile `demo` which also marks me as the owner.\n3."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Dashboard's contributors section doesn't show all the",
+        "description": "Estimated efforts is 1~1.5 weeks, we need the relevant updates to the 2 other components, namespace selector (trivial if any), registration flow (also perhaps trivial), and tests\n\n### Some notes for how to develop\n* First time only:\n```\nnpm i\nmake build-local\nnpm run build\n```\n* Run the commands in\n```yaml\nX-Goog-Authenticated-User-Email: accounts.google.com:kubeflow-user@k\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Dashboard's contributors section doesn't show all is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow -n kubeflow --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n kubeflow --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Estimated efforts is 1~1.5 weeks, we need the relevant updates to the 2 other components, namespace selector (trivial if any), registration flow (also perhaps trivial), and tests\n\n### Some notes for how to develop\n* First time only:\n```\nnpm i\nmake build-local\nnpm run build\n```\n* Run the commands in two separate terminals: `npm run dev` and `kubectl port-forward svc/profiles-kfam 8081:8081`\n\n###",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "X-Goog-Authenticated-User-Email: accounts.google.com:kubeflow-user@k"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
